site.name: Komal Shahid – AI & ML Portfolio
site.tagline_recommended: Building AI that detects, protects, and predicts — with measurable impact.

pages.title: Komal Shahid | AI Engineer & ML Scientist
pages.meta_description: Komal Shahid builds production-ready AI systems — from NLP-based mental health detection to privacy-preserving federated learning. AUC 0.886 on fraud detection.

pages.title: Projects | Komal Shahid AI Portfolio
pages.meta_description: Browse AI/ML projects including NLP mental health detection, federated healthcare learning, and financial fraud detection with reproducible notebooks.

pages.title: AI Depression Detection | NLP Case Study – Komal Shahid
pages.meta_description: DistilBERT-powered depression severity classifier across 4 classes. 91% accuracy on clinical text. Full case study with reproducible notebooks and live demo.

pages.title: Federated Healthcare AI | Privacy-Preserving ML – Komal Shahid
pages.meta_description: Privacy-preserving federated learning across distributed hospitals. Differential privacy + HIPAA-compliant. No raw data shared.

pages.title: Financial Fraud Detection | AUC 0.886 – Komal Shahid
pages.meta_description: Ensemble LightGBM + Autoencoder fraud detection on 800K+ transactions. AUC 0.886. Ethical AI, explainability, bias detection, production-ready.

pages.title: About Komal Shahid | AI Engineer & Data Scientist
pages.meta_description: Komal Shahid is an AI Engineer and Data Scientist specializing in NLP, federated learning, and ethical ML. Available for full-time AI/ML roles.

pages.title: Resume | Komal Shahid AI Engineer
pages.meta_description: One-page resume for Komal Shahid. AI Engineer, ML Engineer, Data Scientist. Skills in PyTorch, HuggingFace, federated learning, LightGBM, FastAPI.

pages.title: Contact Komal Shahid | Schedule Interview
pages.meta_description: Reach Komal Shahid via email, LinkedIn, GitHub, or schedule an interview via Calendly.

pages.title: Technical Blog | Komal Shahid AI Engineer
pages.meta_description: Short technical posts on NLP, federated learning, fairness in ML, and production AI engineering.
